textByHashes.710f10468c5042b87207f0415b7e9d7af2f72d0a: Goodness! As if I don't have enough to do already without giving every adventurer that comes along a history lesson! Let's get this over with quickly. Zanaris is an extremely old place, it was here long before we
textByHashes.a49ba1a13170e2b7237d2a9831a5e8211d12ce6d: fairyfolk came to live here. In fact it is rumoured to be the nexus of all planes. When we arrived here we found many of the magical properties of this place to be dormant. One of these was the ability to jump between
textByHashes.a996b5871723dd165855defe964f921533cd3d68: planes using a powerful portal that had been sealed for centuries. The Fairy Queen harnessed that magic and created the fairy rings, these are not as powerful as the original portal would have been, but are very effective
textByHashes.d3bf1d1844fc68a7a874d806a94576948293ec4b: nonetheless. There are 3 fairy rings in Zanaris, the one in the market and the one near the evil chicken's shrine will only take users to one specific place. However the third fairy ring, near the fountains, is a major portal.
textByHashes.a81a88280b4ff99890bf65e14a6ab792d7903703: Anybody who activates that fairy ring will find themselves able to dial in a 3 digit code. These codes will all take the user to different locations. Some of the codes no longer work and other codes go to extremely
textByHashes.80c70bd35d4f5ff8c97db17d3eade31117690a7d: dangerous places, so be careful. Fortunately the fairy rings are imbued with a powerful protective magic and as long as you stand in the middle of them nothing will be able to attack you. Remember, because you are a
textByHashes.8f0168d435e74652e0361d97307e931eee9216de: human, you will need to be holding your dramen staff to activate the rings. Now I must get back to work, there is so much to do and so few fairies left to do it.
textByHashes.a2559241f167265c679c43cfa16e1a0c5f085660: Fairy Nuff is very proud of that certificate, it's her most prized possession. She won't like you taking it.
textByHashes.74f01fe31770233bfc119a3be5ad2feccf5ad508: They look familiar, but I can't think where I've seen marks like that. Try asking around, maybe someone else will recognise them.
textByHashes.51878770a8660d268475587551b10c99035c10ad: Sorry, I don't have time for idle chit-chat, I need to send a fairy to get little Freddies tooth!
textByHashes.f8ef0ea0e7f215aa2f230e9f00ce5ccaf0c36302: Sorry, I don't have time to talk, I need to send a Tooth Fairy to visit Sarah-Jane!
textByHashes.3db5b8962b4c2d6f1cde158e3b28389070cda274: Sorry, I don't have time for idle chit-chat, I need to find a Winter Fairy to send to Trollheim!
textByHashes.6279167882006e0aad5232a0e51a03fba7b629f5: Sorry, I don't have time to stop, I need to send a Weather Fairy off to Etceteria!
textByHashes.190dcfd659898552753cac308ecf7d1bffe95223: Sorry, I don't have time for idle chit-chat, I need to send an Autumn Fairy off to Burthorpe!
